title: Simple Broadcast
description: A simple, lightweight, and fast plugin for sending automated messages
body:
Simple Minecraft plugin for Paper/Spigot that sends automatic messages to the server chat

❇️​ This plugin belongs to the [Simple Plugins](https://modrinth.com/collection/NkfcCoA2) collection, check out other similar and compatible plugins here

## **Features**

- **Send messages periodically with format and colors**
- **Display messages in the chat or in the action bar**
- **Add a customizable sound to each message** (optional)
- Configurable time interval and randomizable order
  - **NEW:** Disable message sending when the server is empty
  - **NEW:** Add a custom interval based on online players

## **Commands**
- **/sb toggle**	Pauses or resumes automatic message broadcasting
- **/sb reload**	Reloads the plugin configuration

## **Permissions**
- **toggle**: requires permission **sb.toggle** (default: op)
- **reload**: requires permission **sb.reload** (default: op)

## Configuration & Requirements

For more information on configuration and requirements, [visit the plugin GitHub](https://github.com/sardidefcon/simple-broadcast) page
